content.en:
"Evil Dao Ancestor, you can't escape!"

The Dark Temple Lord roared.

He was also very depressed, the Beast Forbidden Land was very remote, and there was no chance, why did Dao Ancestor come here?

And he also has some understanding of the Evil Dao Ancestor, although this Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor specializes in cultivating evil qi, but I don't know how many places in the chaos are rich in evil qi, he shouldn't come to such a remote forbidden place!

It wouldn't be surprising if he knew that the Evil Dao Ancestor had recently created a Evil Qi Gong Technique that required the most top-notch Evil Qi!

"You must kill him!"

The Lord of the Dark Temple said secretly.

In the past, there were occasional True Ancestors who entered the Forbidden Land of Evil Beasts, but once they were discovered, Dao Ancestor made a move and killed them in an instant.

But a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor was not so easy to kill, once the Hellish Dao Ancestor escaped, he knew what the consequences were.

"Die!"

The Lord of the Dark Temple has cast a Dao Technique, the Great Black Sky Divine Spear!

The Great Black Heaven Divine Spear, which was already about to be completed, pierced through the body of the Underworld Dao Ancestor with terrifying power, but this blow alone could not kill the Underworld Dao Ancestor at all.

I saw that the Underworld Dao Ancestor used a strange object of the escape type to escape from the forbidden land of the evil beast in an instant, and the Dao Ancestors of the Dark God Temple chased and killed them together, and they also used strange objects to catch up with the Underworld Dao Ancestor.

In this way, the two sides chased and fled in the Chaotic Void.

For the Dark Temple, the only good news at the moment was that the Underworld Dao Ancestor had no way to send a message to the others.

Like this, who is in the Chaotic Void and wants to communicate to acquaintances in the distant Void, he must prepare for a long time, and he must have a stable Void.

And under the pursuit of the Dark Temple, the void is very unstable, and there is no way to stabilize the transmission signal.

That's why someone is hunted down and no one knows, because it's hard to get the message out.

If you are in the same world, even if the void is unstable, you can still teleport a little distance.

But the Chaotic Void, this distance is too long, and a casual distance is equivalent to a Void Ancient Realm.

......

Three hours later.

The Dark God Dao Ancestor's injuries were not light, and the Dark God Temple Lord used many hole cards and powerful treasures to kill him, and the other Dark God Temple Masters were also very crazy.

He knew why the Dark Temple Lord was so crazy to kill him, and once the headquarters of the Dark Temple was exposed, the Void Heaven would definitely kill him.

Moreover, once the corpse of the realm beast is exposed, it will not be the Void Heaven lineage that will kill, but other forces will also kill.

Under the siege of so many forces, the Dark Temple has no way to survive at all, unless the Dark Temple gives up the corpse of the realm beast!

But once the corpse of the realm beast is abandoned, it is not easy for the people of the Dark Temple to hide, it is easy to be calculated and found, and they will eventually be killed by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven lineage.

Therefore, once the news is exposed, the Dark Temple will inevitably perish.

"Dark God Temple Master, I won't reveal the location of your Dark God Temple, and I won't reveal the realm beasts, can you spare me?" said the Underworld Dao Ancestor.

"Stop and let's talk slowly!"

The Dark Temple Master responded.

Stop it?

The Underworld Dao Ancestor was not stupid, he knew that once he stopped, the Dark God Temple Lord would definitely trap him first, and then kill him at any cost.

Definitely can't stop!

He didn't stop, and the Dark Temple Lord didn't give up the pursuit, and was still attacking him with the strongest means.

In this way, neither side trusts the other, and there is no way to communicate.

"Looks like this treasure has to be used!"

The Evil Dao Ancestor took out a wooden sword, revealing a painful look.

It was a treasure he had accidentally obtained from the Dark Forbidden Domain, where he had obtained the wooden sword from the inside of a ruined ruin.

After a long period of research, he finally figured out the usefulness of this wooden sword.

To put it simply, it allows the Underworld Dao Ancestor to escape.

Once the wooden sword is activated, it can be transformed into a sword light to tear through all bans, easily break through the void, cross long distances, and even cut through techniques such as cause and effect tracing.

Therefore, once the wooden sword is used, he has a hundred percent hope of escaping.

But if the wooden sword is used, then he will not have the wooden sword, which is equivalent to losing a hole card.

"That's it, use it!"

The Demonic Dao Ancestor urged the wooden sword.

The next moment, the wooden sword turned into sword light and enveloped the Underworld Dao Ancestor, piercing through the chaotic void and disappearing in an instant.

Whoa!!!

The Dark God Temple Master and several other Dao Ancestors stopped one after another, they couldn't track down the Underworld Dao Ancestor, even a few secret techniques cast on the Underworld Dao Ancestor couldn't sense it.

This shows that the Underworld Dao Ancestor has fled, and is in a very distant place.

"Damn it!"

The Dark God Temple Lord was extremely angry, and his furious momentum caused the other Dao Ancestors to retreat one after another.

Everyone knew very well that the catastrophe of the Dark Temple had struck.

"Hall Master, what should I do?"

A Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor asked.

"Ask the Liuli Sect, can their Dao Ancestor come to the Liuli Sect in advance to protect us?" ordered the Dark God Temple Master.

Several other Dao Ancestors were secretly speechless, how could the Liuli Sect forcibly let Dao Ancestors wake up!

Moreover, the Dao Ancestors of the Liuli Sect are all asleep in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, once they wake up, I am afraid that they will be immediately suppressed by the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, although they can forcibly rush out of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but the price is too great, and at least they will not be able to return to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm for a long time.

However, this was an order from the Lord of the Dark Temple, and they naturally did not dare to disobey it.

......

Liulizong.

Xuangang True Ancestor got the news from the Dark Temple.

"The Beast has been discovered, the Dark Temple of Impotence!"

Xuangang True Ancestor said coldly.

He went to consult the Dao Ancestors who had awakened a wisp of consciousness, and got a negative answer.

It is impossible to go to the rescue!

Xuangang True Ancestor has already guessed this answer, at present, the Liuli Sect has transferred all the boundary stones born in the world in the body of the boundary beast to the Liuli Sect, although the boundary beast is still slowly giving birth to the boundary stones, but it will take a long time.

If the beasts are not discovered, they will naturally continue to support the Dark Temple.

But now, the realm beasts have been discovered, and they will not be stupid to protect the Dark Temple, and there is no way to protect them at present.

"Let those True Ancestors who guarded the Dark God Realm come back!"

Xuangang True Ancestor gave this order.

This order also represents that the Liuli Sect has completely abandoned the Dark God Temple, and in general, the loss of the Liuli Sect is not large, and to a certain extent, it is still earned.

The Liuli Sect had lost a Supreme True Ancestor, but it had gained a large number of boundary stones, and the deal was worth it.

The other side.

The Underworld Dao Ancestor escaped, and he also showed a look of anger.

He felt that he was very wronged, he just entered a forbidden place to look for evil qi, and he was chased and killed by the Dark Temple, if he hadn't used the secret treasure wooden sword, I am afraid it would be difficult to escape.

As soon as he thought of that wooden sword, the Evil Dao Ancestor felt very heartbroken in his heart.

"Dark Temple, you made me lose the treasure, and I also made your Dark Temple desperate!"

The Underworld Dao Ancestor immediately began to carry out a message, telling the Dark God Temple that the headquarters was in the forbidden land of the Evil Beasts and the matter of the Realm Beasts.

Soon, the news spread one force after another.

Void Heaven.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also got the news and knew that the headquarters of the Dark Temple was located in the Forbidden Land of the Evil Beasts, and it was also inside a Realm Beast corpse.

"Realm Beast, I didn't expect the Dark Temple to be inside the Realm Beast, no wonder I couldn't find the slightest bit of news about the Dark Temple headquarters, and I couldn't even deduce half of it!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor completely understood.

At the same time, he was also very excited.

The corpse of the beast!

What a value!

It is rumored that the inner world of the Boundary Beast can give birth to geniuses, and if you cultivate living beings in the inner world of the Boundary Beast, you can definitely cultivate a large number of geniuses.

Now, he also knew that the Dark Temple had never recruited geniuses, so why it was able to give birth to so many strong people.

Before, he thought it was the Dark Temple secretly capturing geniuses.

But now, he understands!

No matter how much you capture a genius, it can't be compared with a genius cultivated by yourself, after all, the loyalty of a captured genius cannot be guaranteed, and only a genius cultivated by yourself can guarantee loyalty.

With a realm beast, it is too simple to want a genius, so he can grow the Dark Temple, and once became the top power after the four transcendent forces.

"Let's go, go to the Forbidden Land!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor led more than 200 Dao Ancestors to tear through the void and rushed to the Beast Forbidden Land.

Daoshan.

When the Daoshan Dao Master heard about the corpse of the realm beast, he also hurriedly went out.

When the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was born, he didn't even appear, but the corpse of the realm beast attracted him.

After all, he couldn't enter the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and it was useless to go, so he could only take a look.

But the corpse of the realm beast was different, it was a visible opportunity, with the strength of his fivefold heavenly dao ancestor, he felt that he was sure to compete for the corpse of the realm beast.

Forbidden Temple.

After hearing about the corpse of the Realm Beast, the Hall Master of the Forbidden Hall couldn't help but get out of the customs and led a group of Dao Ancestors towards the Forbidden Land of the Evil Beast.

The other two transcendent forces, the Chaos Life Alliance and the Starhorn Clan, also sent a large number of Dao Ancestors to the Beast Forbidden Land.

All of a sudden, the five transcendent forces and many top forces took action one after another, just for the corpse of the realm beast.
